close_reason: Implemented ignore/ig command with managed .gitignore block, tests all passing
description:
New command 'ignore' (alias 'ig') that:
- Reads all installed packages in the current project (using package-state + package-registry)
- Collects all file paths that packages provide (from their files/ directories)
- Converts them to relative paths from project root
- Checks .gitignore for existing entries (avoid duplicates)
- Appends missing entries under a managed section header
- Idempotent: safe to run multiple times
- Users can remove entries manually to version specific files
- Tests required as part of this feature
title: Add ig|ignore command to auto-update .gitignore with package files

description: Implemented sync (alias: s) command with -g/--global flag and --watch mode. Re-syncs installed packages from central repo to projects.
title: add sync command
